# Safariyat Games

> Safariyat Games (ألعاب سفريات) is a free, browser-based hub of online
> multiplayer party games you play with friends — no download and no sign-up.
> The interface is fully bilingual (English and Arabic) with right-to-left
> support, and several games include built-in voice chat.

Site: https://games.safariyat.live

## How it works

- Open the site, pick a game, and create a room.
- Share the room link or numeric room code with friends so they can join.
- Rooms can be filled with bots to play immediately.
- Everything runs in the browser (desktop or mobile). Nothing to install.

## Games

- [Liar's Bar](https://games.safariyat.live/play): A real-time multiplayer
  bluffing card game (with a dominoes variant). Play cards face-down while
  claiming what they are, call out opponents you think are lying, and race to
  empty your hand. Known in Arabic as "أشك".
- [Codenames](https://games.safariyat.live/codenames): The classic team
  word-guessing game. Spymasters give one-word clues to lead their team to the
  right words while avoiding the assassin. Fully playable in Arabic and
  English, with voice chat. Known in Arabic as "كودنيمز".
- [Higher or Lower](https://games.safariyat.live/higher-lower): A fast number
  guessing party game. Each player has a secret number; compare ranges with
  others and be the first to zero in on your number. Known in Arabic as
  "أعلى أو أقل".

## Key facts

- Price: free to play.
- Accounts: not required (optional Google sign-in only).
- Languages: English and Arabic (RTL supported).
- Platform: any modern web browser, desktop or mobile.
- Best for: friends and small groups playing together in real time.

## More

- [Play Liar's Bar](https://games.safariyat.live/play)
- [Play Codenames](https://games.safariyat.live/codenames)
- [Play Higher or Lower](https://games.safariyat.live/higher-lower)
